Additionally, provide information on the vessel's combat history and any notable battles it participated in. Your submission should include:

* A detailed description of the vessel's design and layout, including its length, beam, draft, and displacement
* A list of its armament, including main guns, secondary guns, torpedoes, and anti-aircraft defenses
* An explanation of its propulsion system, including the type of engines and boilers used
* A description of its defensive features, including armor plating, watertight compartments, and damage control systems
* A brief history of the vessel's service, including any notable battles or engagements it participated in
* At least three (3) references to historical sources or academic articles that support your design choices

Your submission should be 2-3 pages in length, double-spaced, and in 12-point Times New Roman font. You must include an introduction, body, and conclusion, and must properly cite any sources used in APA format.
